admin.max_size_help: Upper limit for cover and avatar-original uploads, in kilobytes. Note: the global FoF Upload maximum file size also applies — the lower of the two limits wins.
admin.cover_height_help: Height of the profile hero when a cover is set.
admin.overlay_help: A dark layer rendered over covers so usernames and stats stay legible on bright images.
admin.show_on_popover_label: Show covers on user hover cards
admin.show_on_popover_help: Displays the cover (lightweight thumbnail) in the card that appears when hovering a poster's name.
admin.show_on_directory_label: Show covers in the user directory
admin.show_on_directory_help: Applies when the FoF User Directory extension is enabled.
admin.media_picker_label: Allow choosing a cover from My Media
admin.media_picker_help: Adds a "Choose from My Media" button so users can reuse images they already uploaded.
admin.avatar_focus_help: Avatar uploads keep the original image in the user's media manager, and users can re-position the crop at any time without re-uploading. The avatar itself remains a standard Flarum avatar everywhere.
admin.default_cover_help: Optional image shown for users without a cover of their own. Uploads go to your shared media. Leave empty for the classic solid color.
admin.default_avatar_help: Optional image shown for users without an avatar. Uploads go to your shared media. Leave empty for Flarum's letter avatars.

default.cover_empty: No default cover yet — upload an image or choose one from your shared media.
default.avatar_empty: No default avatar yet — upload an image or choose one from your shared media.
default.size_hint: Maximum size: {max}. The full-resolution image is kept; drag to choose the visible area.
default.remove_confirm: Remove this default image? The file will stay in your shared media.
default.picker_empty: No shared images yet. Upload one to your shared media first.
default.generic_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

support.title: Support This Extension
support.description: If you find this extension useful, please consider supporting its development with a small donation. Every contribution helps keep the project alive and maintained.

api.invalid_focus: The focal point must be a number between 0 and 100.
api.invalid_zoom: The zoom must be a number between 0.5 and 4.
api.unsupported_type: This file type is not supported. Allowed formats — JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF.
api.no_adapter: Image uploads are not configured on this forum (FoF Upload mime settings).
api.upload_failed: The file could not be stored. Please try again.
api.too_many_uploads: You are uploading too quickly. Please wait a minute and try again.
api.file_not_eligible: This file cannot be used as a cover.
api.no_default_image: There is no default image to re-position.
api.no_cover: There is no cover to re-position.
api.no_original: The original avatar image is unavailable — upload a new avatar first.
api.original_unreadable: The original image could not be read. Upload a new avatar instead.
api.avatar_focus_disabled: Avatar focal-point editing is disabled on this forum.

editor.title: Profile cover
editor.empty_hint: No cover yet — upload an image or pick one from your media.
editor.size_hint: Maximum size: {max}. The full-resolution image is kept; drag to choose the visible area.
editor.drag_hint: Drag to re-position, scroll to zoom
editor.drag_aria: Image position editor. Use arrow keys to move the focal point, plus and minus to zoom.
editor.remove_confirm: Remove this cover? The image will stay in your media manager.
editor.generic_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

avatar.title: Avatar position
avatar.hint: Drag the image to choose the visible circle. The avatar is re-cropped from the original in full quality.
avatar.no_original: No source image yet — upload one or pick it from your media to position your avatar.
